testcase.name: test_meal_plan_query_detects_dine_pillar
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_dine_pillar_os_awareness.py:35: in test_meal_plan_query_detects_dine_pillar assert response.status_code == 200, f"API returned {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: API returned 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","message"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"input":"Create a meal plan for my dog","pet_id":"pet-99a708f1722a","session_id":"test-dine-meal-plan"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
